feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get Variant Management tile in Build Work Zone?
entry.content:
The documentation for Create a Process Variant, states 

Prerequisites

  • Variant Management is a tile in your site created with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

  • You have access to the variant management editor.

How can I get Variant Management tile? I don't find this listed in "Content Manager / Content Explorer / HTML5 Apps". 

I am guessing that "variant management editor" is the application that is opened by this tile. What is the role required to have access to this application?

entry.title: Using the capture screen in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Using the capture screen in SAP Build Process Automation start for google.com, start a search, specify images, and then take the first 10 images and save them as JPGs in the local file system.

can you help me to achieve it.

@Dan_Wroblewski 
SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Form not shown in MyInbox Workzone standard
entry.content: In my workzone standard portal the My Inbox does show the tasks. But when I click on the task the form is not shown to approve or descline a task (see first screenshot). The inbox is working directly in the SAP BTP cockpit (second screenshot) so it seems a kind of authorization problem.

entry.title: How can auto-approval of a form be achieved in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a workflow requirement where the initial form fields (Form 1) should be non-editable. Once the form reaches 3 months from the created date, it should move to the next step (Form 2), where all the fields should become editable. I tried updating the task to "Completed" using Postman, but I am encountering the following error. Is there anyway to achieve form auto approval after 3 months? Kindly help us to over come this issue. 

Thanks,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability #Auto Approval Form

entry.title: Data Integration in Form BPA- Destination/s Creation in BTP
entry.content:
Novice, learning 1st steps to BPA and its integration.

I am trying to understand what is the best way to create a single destination in BTP (for S4 On-Premise) to consume Odata service say for Cost Centres and Materials to further use returned results integrated in Forms of BPA.

See attached snapshots, I have created multiple (2 destinations) in BTP, one for Cost Centre and another for Materials, but sure I think it should be possible to parameterise specific API against field/s in Forms of BPA while referring the Data Source or somewhere else in BPA, or creating multiple destinations is the only way? My API's/fetch work and gets data from S4 but its a pain to manage multiple destination albeit creation is one time activity.

Destinations in BTP:

Data Source in BPA Form

Thanks

SK

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: MODELO DE AUTORIZACIÓN DOCUMENTO VENCIDO
entry.content:
Buenas tardes para todos he intentado realizar un query para un modelo de autorización el cual cada vez que un cliente tenga una factura vencida se active el modelo de autorización para que sea aprobado.

Actualmente cuento con el siguiente Query pero no me aparece la ventana para enviar al aprobador "Por favor pueden ayudarme a validar que me hace falta para que funcione correctamente ? 

SELECT DISTINCT
'TRUE'
FROM
OCRD T1
INNER JOIN
OINV T2 ON T1."CardCode" = T2."CardCode"
WHERE
T1."CardCode" = $[ORDR.CardCode]
AND T2."DocStatus" = 'O'
AND T2."DocDueDate" < GETDATE()



 

Muchas gracias quedare muy atento.

entry.title: Where can I get the event specification for a custom RAP BO event defined in S/4HANA on-premise?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have developed a custom event based on RAP BO to trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation. In order to create a custom event project, we need to upload an event specification from the Build Lobby.

Now, my question is where I can get the event specification for a custom event in S/4HANA on-premise? For S/4HANA Public Cloud, I've seen the "Maintain Event Channel Binding" Fiori app was used to get the metadata, but I cannot find the same option in the channel configuration customizing.

Any input is greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have configured Event Mesh (in Integration Suite) and SAP Build Process Automation to start a process when a journal entiry is created in S/4HANA on-premise.

A webhook subscription has been created in Event Mesh, and the handshake was successful.

 

A process has been created with an event trigger, and deployed.

When a journal entry is created in S/4HANA, the number of t"Message Queued" increased to 1, and soon decreased to 0. This indicates that the message was sent to the webhook (Build Process Automation).

However, no process started in Build Process Automation. Now I am wondering where the message has gone.

Monitoroing > Event Aquisition > Business Events shows no data.

Could anyone tell me where such "lost" events can be monitored and investigated?

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: How to Dynamically Update Workflow Steps in SAP Build Process Automation Based on External API Data?
entry.content:
I am working on a project using SAP Build Process Automation and have encountered a challenge that I hope someone can help with.

The requirement is to dynamically configure workflow steps based on data fetched from an external API. For example, depending on the API response (which might include specific approval levels, user roles, and decision paths), the workflow should adapt in real time to accommodate additional steps or skip certain ones.

Here’s what I have done so far:

  1. Configured an integration step to call the external API and fetch the required data.
  2. Set up dynamic variables within the process context to store API responses.

However, I am facing issues in dynamically:

  • Adding/removing steps from the workflow sequence.
  • Assigning users or roles fetched from the API to these steps.
  • Ensuring that the workflow continues seamlessly after these adjustments.

Does SAP Build Process Automation natively support this kind of dynamic workflow configuration, or would I need to use custom scripting? If scripting is required, can you share examples or best practices to implement this?

***REMOVED BY MODERATION***

Looking forward to your guidance and insights. Any related blogs, documentation, or similar scenarios would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Authentication Issues occur when sending mail to outlook mail from sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to send notification mail to outlook mail from the workflow that is created by sap build process automation.

And my outlook mail has 2 factor authentication.

And I followed this document to create mail destination.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-process-automation-smtp-mail-destination-using-microsoft-365/ba-p/13869543

This is the destination I created.

All Client ID, Secret and Token Service URL are get according to the document I mentioned above.

But, when I sent test mail from Mail Server of SAP Build, the following authentication error is occurring.

 

Could you please check me which part I missing?

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: How to create many approvers in workflow that is created by SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to create the Approval process with many approvers in the workflow that is created by SAP Build Process Automation.

The Approval process I would like to get is that

if price > 100, go to Approver A

else if price >= 100 <= 300, go to Approver A, if Approver A approved, go to Approver B

else if price > 300, go to Approver C

So, the corresponding approval request should be sent to the corresponding Approver's Inbox only and other approvers should not see it.

 

For now, I created all approver users under my BTP account's Security > Users.

So, all approver users share to use only one Inbox and all approval requests sent from Workflow of SAP Build Process Automation can be able to see by all approvers.

 

Is it possible to show the corresponding request only for the corresponding approver by creating users like this?

If yes, which step I need to add to get the requirement?

(or)

If not, could you please guide me how can I get this kind of Approval process?

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: SAP IRPA/Build Get Open Workbook List gives more records
entry.content:
Hi experts, do you have any idea why this function doubles entry for each open workbook?

For example if I have one workbook open, it gives two records to the list - one is with complete path, eg. C:\IRPA\workbook1.xlsx and the other one is workbook1.xlsx

In such case its not possible to add loop that gets the path and closes the workbooks that I want. Actually its possible using also Try Catch in the loop, but still would like to have only one results for each opened workbook. Isnt that a bug that it gives more inputs for one workbook? Thank you

SAP Build Process Automation @Chaitanya_Priya

entry.title: Difficulties Accessing Excel Workbook in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm not an expert in Build process automation, but I worked on a project a year ago where I had to open an Excel file at the beginning to extract data. Everything worked correctly with just the Open Excel Instance -> Open Workbook steps, and I was able to proceed with my activities on the data.

However, I’m now working on a new project, and after the Open Workbook step, I receive the error: "Please define an active worksheet before using this activity." Even when I define a worksheet, I get another message: "No active workbook."

Additionally, when I try to use the Activate Workbook activity, I can't seem to configure it properly. The activity only asks for the workbook name, and when I provide it, it’s not recognized.

Has anyone encountered this issue or know a solution?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: What are the options for restoring a project version containing decision
entry.content:
SAP Build Process automation does not yet support restoring an older version of a project if the project contains a decision. I don't see an item in the roadmap for this either. 

What tactic do you use to restore a project with a decision? Are there any known workarounds?

entry.title: How to find the history of approved or rejected form in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created approval workflow using sap build process automation.

And once the approver "approved" or "rejected" the approval, the form is disappeared from the Inbox of approver.

But we would like to see the history form later for tracking.

So, how can we remain the history list of approval form in the inbox?

(or)

Is there any place we can check where the history record of that approval form are keeping in the sap btp?

Could you please answer?

 

Thank You.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: How to create code list field in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to create code list field in the workflow of sap build process automation.

for example: 

for field named "Tools", we would like user to choose the code list data as drop down field instead of entering user by themselves.

Code list data sample

1. SAP Build Apps

2. SAP Build Process Automation

3. SAP Built Work Zone

 

And is it possible to do this following requirement?

we would like to map "Tools" field and "Cost" field and store somewhere in sap build process automation itself. (or) storing in somewhere outside sap build process automation and calling data using API.

sample data

Tools                                                Cost

SAP Build Apps                                 100

SAP Build Process Automation         150

SAP Build Work Zone                         50

 

if User select "SAP Build Apps" in "Tools" field, "100" will be automatically displayed in the field "Cost".

 

If you have any experience about like this, could you please share with me?

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: SBPA Screen recognition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to run an automation which will do a loop in the screen, but on the second time it's not recognizing the screen. Can anyone help me on why this is happening and what can be done to resolve this issue.

Thanks in advance.
Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Unable to download Agent 3 on Mac
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to download Agent 3 on a Mac. 

Operating system : macOS Sequoia Version 15.1.1

Broswer : Chrome

I am following the instruction as per the the help documentation. 

Install MacOS Agent 3 

However I keep getting an error message "Unable to install the agent. Please contact your administrator"

I have full administrative rights on the computer. 

There is no option to download the Agent form the website below where the Windows version can be downloaded directly. 

https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloud 

See image for the error message when trying to download it based on the instruction in the help documentation.

entry.title: Deployment error in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am getting an error when I try to deploy a release version in SAP Build Process Automation:

I tried to create the same project in other subaccounts, but i'm facing the same problem. Also, I checked the note 3426215 - SBPA project deployment fails with error "PB_CONNECTOR_WORKFLOW_ERROR: Request failed with status code 429" | SAP Knowledge Base Article but the subaccount has the standard plan for SAP BPA and there is only one project created.

Does anyone have the same problem? What is the solution?

Many Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Error when create Actions in Process Automation with SAP Business One Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating an Actions to call Services Layer objects from Process Automation but couldn't create Actions.

I've created Destinations in BTP but when create Actions in SAP Builds errors happen

1. Destinations configuration

2. Create Actions with error

Please help to advise and share your experienced.

Thank you so much,

Best Regards,

Tam
